title: Wire substrate-runtime policy responses to EncumbrancePressureLevel transitions
description:
Per [[substrate-sync-cost-pattern-2026-05-26]] Layer 5. Substrate-runtime work: connect EncumbrancePressureLevel transitions to typed substrate-policy responses. Transition rules: `moderate → heavy` triggers operator-confirmation gate on new ability acquisitions; `heavy → at-ceiling` triggers auto-discharge of unused abilities (release context capacity); `at-ceiling → over-ceiling` triggers auto-invocation of wd (winddown) skill; `over-ceiling` refuses all new work except wd. Investigation aspect: where does this enforcement live? Pre-LLM-call substrate code? Harness-layer hooks? Agent-runtime per [[agent-blame-shielded-workflow-doctrine-2026-05-26]] Gap 2? Output: typed investigation report identifying the right enforcement layer + recommended primitives for substrate to author. May graduate sub-beads as authoring work spawns. BLOCKS on EncumbrancePressureLevel ordinality table + investigate-harness-side-ability-jit-loader (shared runtime question).

## Composes with existing types (per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]])

- InferenceCircuitBreaker (inference-account-schemas v0.2.0) — at-ceiling threshold triggers breaker logic
- EncumbrancePressureLevel ordinality (this cohort) — pressure-level → policy-response mapping
